name: Create A Sandbox Maropost Commerce Store For Testing
body:
[{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Steps"}], "data-id": "steps"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Log in to the Maropost Commerce "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/partner-portal", "children": [{"text": "partner portal"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From the "}, {"text": "Create New Store", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, enter the customer's "}, {"text": "Business Name", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter the customer's email address in the "}, {"text": "Merchant's email", "bold": true}, {"text": " field."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the customer's location "}, {"text": "Country", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the dropdown."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the customer's business "}, {"text": "Industry vertical", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the dropdown."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select 'Sandbox' from the "}, {"text": "Trial type", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select 'Just investigating' from the "}, {"text": "Described as", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the radio button next to the relevant trial period ('Choose the length of the trial')."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Create store ", "bold": true}, {"text": "button."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Maropost Commerce will advise you that a store is being created. Once completed, the store details will display."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Result"}], "data-id": "result"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You have successfully created a Sandbox Maropost Commerce store for testing."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can either log in to the newly-created store, view the webstore or view the list of previously-created stores."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you require a permanent webstore that can be used to showcase Maropost Commerce to clients:

Complete the steps above.

Create a case for our Support team, listing the webstore URL and the request to make the store a sandbox account."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Related Articles"}], "data-id": "related-articles"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "/articles/Knowledge/Create-A-Store-On-Behalf-Of-A-Client", "children": [{"text": "Create A Maropost Commerce Store On Behalf Of A Client"}]}]}]}]}]
